headlines.title: Colombia's Oil and Gas Reserves Keep Shrinking
headlines.summary: For a decade, Colombia's economically vital oil industry has been caught in a death spiral. headlines.title: OPEC Oil Production Jumps, But Gulf Supply Is Still Far From Normal
headlines.summary: OPEC's oil production rebounded sharply in June as Gulf producers finally began bringing shut-in barrels back online after months of war-induced disruptions.
